name: Seer, Inc.
business: Seer, Inc. is a commercial-stage life sciences technology company. It expects to generate substantially all of its revenue from the sale of the Proteograph Product Suite, which includes the SP100 or SP200 automation instrument, proprietary engineered nanoparticle (NP) technology, and Proteograph Analysis Suite software. The company sells its products to academic institutions, laboratories, biopharmaceutical companies, and other research institutions.

exposures.sentence: the Proteograph Product Suite, including our SP100 or SP200 automation instrument, proprietary engineered nanoparticle (NP) technology and Proteograph Analysis Suite software.
the proteomics market may develop more slowly or differently, including as a result of the impact of artificial intelligence (AI).
